description: A land surveyor needs a table of all corner coordinates from planning zone polygon boundaries for GPS field verification. Using the polygon layer from /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson, extract the corner vertices into a point layer and add explicit X (longitude) and Y (latitude) coordinate columns. Export the resulting point layer as a CSV file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/polygon_vertices.csv, ensuring it contains all attribute columns including coordinates, vertex_index, and original polygon attributes like name and id. Save the QGIS project to /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/vertex_extraction.qgs.
